steps.t: Angbor has asked you to travel to the meeting of the roads just south of Imloth Melui, in Lossarnach, to learn the state of the war in that land.
Bandron and Nethadan have stopped their waggon south of Imloth Melui, in Lossarnach, and you should find out what has brought them here and why they h…
Bandron has asked you to go to Harlond and <rgb=#FF0000>look</rgb> at certain locations to determine whether it is safe for him to go that…
Bandron is by his waggon in Lossarnach, south of Imloth Melui. You have investigated the port of the Harlond and found that it is occupied by the enem…
Nethadan is somewhere within Imloth Melui, looking for a purchaser for the Cemenduril liquor.
Bandron is on the road south of Imloth Melui, waiting for his son Nethadan to return.
Angbor is standing by Bandron's waggon on the road south of Imloth Melui, in Lossarnach.
